Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Flowing Sword]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Blackflame ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 19''' — The Flowing Sword is an Enforcer technique that collects aura with every slash and thrust.}}

== Ghostwater ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 4''' — The Flowing Sword is a technique that makes a blade shine like a silver star and carries power like a Truegold's weapon.}}

== Underlord ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 21''' — Flowing Sword is a technique Yerin used to make her blade glow.}}

== Uncrowned ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 20''' — The Flowing Sword is Yerin's weapon Enforcement technique.}}

== Wintersteel ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 1''' — Flowing Sword is a technique used by Yerin.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 25''' — Ruby uses the Flowing Sword.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 25''' — Yerin used her Flowing Sword against Sophara's chest.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 26''' — Flowing Sword is a technique used by Yerin.}}

== Reaper ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 12''' — The Flowing Sword is the weapon Enforcer technique of Yerin's Path.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 12''' — Yerin activated the Flowing Sword technique.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 24''' — Yerin can form the Flowing Sword around her weapon using madra.}}

== Waybound ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 20''' — Yerin used her Flowing Sword to catch the Weeping Dragon's claw.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
